data.title: 国际服活动常驻化「Business Trip! Momoyodou Beach Shack Franchise Plan」
data.summary: [Immortalized Event Notice] The Event Story, "Business Trip! Momoyodou Beach Shack Franchise Plan" i
data.body:
[Immortalized Event Notice]

The Event Story, "Business Trip! Momoyodou Beach Shack Franchise Plan" is now immortalized, so you can play it anytime you want!

Will the Momoyodou's new business run smoothly? If you haven't seen it yet, now's the time to log in and enjoy the story!
